coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 3-group, 170-node closure.
validation: Exact Blender topology and four-decimal bounds across fifteen cases covering pixelation (including the empty endpoint), crop with zero and rounded fillets, full-color mode, density/structure extremes, and HSV/contrast controls. Image Texture now adapts Grid's POINT-domain UV field onto the FACE consumer before nonlinear linear-CLIP lookup of the packed queen-of-swords image; the raw sampled field correlates 0.999992 with Blender and the final stored img color correlates 0.999943 after reproducing the legacy Hue Saturation Value N++ group and bounded color-attribute storage. The authored shader keeps planar Generated Z = 0.5, signed PCG3D and binary Greater Than semantics. A browser capture now reconstructs Blender legacy Eevee's 64-sample Blackman-Harris jitter sequence and accumulates complete half-float frames instead of approximating derivatives inside the shader. At 768x768 the authored comparison reaches 0.9683 pixel correlation, 0.9824 macro correlation, 0.0395 binary disagreement and 0.0573 luminance MAE. The remaining residual is cross-renderer raster coverage and antialiasing, so exact shader parity is not claimed.
